# Native Static Outputs

GitHub Actions writes platform static libraries here before packing the NuGet package.

Expected generated layout:

```text
External/NativeStatic/win-x64/native inputs
External/NativeStatic/win-arm64/native inputs
External/NativeStatic/linux-x64/native inputs
External/NativeStatic/linux-arm64/native inputs
External/NativeStatic/osx-x64/native inputs
External/NativeStatic/osx-arm64/native inputs
```

The repository keeps build patches here, but platform `.a` and `.lib` outputs are generated by the workflow and are not source files.
